content: {"file": "backend/pipeline/nodes/generate.py", "summary": "This file contains logic for generating user stories, development tasks, and unit test tasks using the Claude Sonnet model from Anthropic. It constructs a context message with project metadata, solution design document, retrieved context, and clarification answers to send to the language model via LangChain-Anthropic API. The response is then parsed to extract JSON-formatted user stories.", "rules": [{"name": "_format_chunks", "description": "Formats chunks of retrieved context into a readable string format.", "conditions": ["chunks list provided"], "actions": ["returns formatted string"]}, {"name": "_format_clarifications", "description": "Formats clarification questions and answers into a readable string format.", "conditions": ["answers dictionary provided"], "actions": ["returns formatted string"]}, {"name": "_build_user_message", "description": "Constructs the user message to be sent to Claude Sonnet with project metadata, solution design document, retrieved context, and clarifications.", "conditions": ["StoryForgeState object provided"], "actions": ["returns formatted user message string"]}, {"name": "_parse_stories", "description": "Parses raw text response from Claude Sonnet into a list of JSON-formatted stories.", "conditions": ["raw_text string provided"], "actions": ["raises ValueError if not valid JSON array, returns parsed stories otherwise"]}, {"name": "generate_node", "description": "Asynchronously sends the constructed user message to Claude Sonnet and parses the response to extract generated stories. Updates state with errors or success status.", "conditions": ["StoryForgeState object provided"], "actions": ["returns updated StoryForgeState with generated stories and status"]}], "dependencies": ["config.settings", "pipeline.nodes.json_response.extract_json", "pipeline.nodes.json_response.extract_text", "pipeline.state.StoryForgeState", "prompts.system_prompt.SYS_PROMPT", "prompts.system_prompt_selftest.SYS_PROMPT"]}
